item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Weird, but very charming and inventive (decent dad joke punchline too)

+1

item.title: Sometimes, some things are just a wild goosechase...
item.content:encoded:
Hello everyone! This is Veralta once again, presenting a story about chasing geese, eggs that hatch into Paris, and eccentricity (well-meaning and nostalgic by the way) when you have the money. Enjoy!

This was actually the product of a site-19 chat joke concerning 'French Eggs', which was a part of a spoof concerning the 'Partridge in the Pear Tree' song.

Special thanks to DrAkimoto1, forbiddenquest, DianaBerry, fairydoctor, kidf, barredowl, Calibri_Bold, anorrack, Naveil, Marcelles_Raynes, theycallmetim, Ekronak, Meska and jornax. You really helped me bring out Gastoneu's character and the weirdness of hatching Paris:)

Image Credits
Omelets are yummy.

All of these images are released to flickr under the CC BY 2.0 License.

1. 'Paris' by Tomasz Baranowski. Retrieved from https://www.flickr.com/photos/155376904@N07/42251510942/in/faves-188461882@N07/

2. 'African Goose' by Jean. Retrieved from https://www.flickr.com/photos/7326810@N08/1404629680/in/faves-188461882@N07/

This image's hue and saturation was edited using a gradient map to show a more yellow tone.

3. 04/100 Scott by spurekar. Retrieved from https://www.flickr.com/photos/spurekar/23784512082/in/faves-188461882@N07/

Footnotes
1. Who guided me with the direction this draft took, which I'm really happy about.
